rationale: Open Question #4 now formally states AC #7 is deferred to Phase 2 — source plan only 'recommended' noting it, revised plan explicitly descopes it.
Design Decision #6 in source plan had max_api_calls; revised plan removed it entirely.
Design Decision #12 added in revised plan with full Codex fix-attempt contract (prompt, commit, re-test, halt semantics).
Task 9 done-criteria in revised plan includes 'gh pr close + git push origin --delete autorun/<slug>' on final failure — not present in source plan.
Task 9 done-criteria added clean-halt verification checklist: git status clean, state.json.stage matches last completed wave, STOP file still present.
Task 9 done-criteria added test_cmd='exit 1' as documented mechanism for forcing retry+rollback; source plan had no test mechanism.
Task 3 dep changed from '1' to '9' in revised task table; source plan had dep '1'.
Task 7 dep changed from '5' (parallel with 6) to '6' (sequential after risk-analysis); source plan had task 7 as parallel with 6.
Task 10 split into 10a (orchestrator core, M), 10b (PR+provenance, S), 10c (Codex+fix+merge, S) in revised plan; source plan had single L task 10.
Task 9 done-criteria now explicitly states pre-build-sha.txt is written once at Stage 4 entry, never overwritten on retries 2+3.
Task 10a scope now includes AUTORUN_DRY_RUN stub mode; source plan had no dry-run mechanism.
Task 10a scope now includes orphan cleanup (delete stale remote branch before Stage 1 re-entry); source plan had no remote orphan cleanup.
